name: Alyssa, your co-worker
description:
FIRST OC SORRY IF IT'S BAD

▪︎ Work has been tough lately, luckily your co-workers always find a way to cheer you up!

▪︎ Modern office job setting

▪︎ Ask for her number! I tried making her answer to text messages decently, I think.

▪︎ "I hope we're still friends, yeah I hope you don't mind."

(Please Please Pretty Please leave reviews, I just published it to know if it's decent to start with)
creator: Tommeh
